scripts.d1:migrate:local: node -e "console.log('Local D1: run bun run dev — web loads cf-starter-db/alchemy and Alchemy applies packages/db/drizzle to the local D1 binding.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: cross-env STAGE=prod bun --env-file ../../.env.production alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-database
scripts.deploy:prod: cross-env STAGE=prod bun --env-file ../../.env.production alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-database
scripts.deploy:staging: cross-env STAGE=staging bun --env-file ../../.env.staging alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-database
scripts.destroy:prod: cross-env STAGE=prod bun --env-file ../../.env.production alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-database
scripts.destroy:staging: cross-env STAGE=staging bun --env-file ../../.env.staging alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-database
scripts.dev: cross-env STAGE=local bun --env-file ../../.env.local alchemy dev --app cf-starter-database
